headline: Cognitive Biases: A Practical Guide to Clearer Thinking
description: Cognitive biases are systematic errors in thinking affecting judgment and decision making. Over 180 documented biases influence everything from medical diagnoses to investment choices.

citation.name: Nudge: Improving Decisions About Health, Wealth, and Happiness
Thinking, Fast and Slow (2025 Paperback Edition)
citation.author: Kahneman D.

citation.name: Predictably Irrational: The Hidden Forces That Shape Our Decisions (2025 Revised)
citation.author: Ariely D.
